thinking.text:
I can't find any specific tool or process that allows me as an agent to submit a Diamond Elite Card application on behalf of the user. The knowledge base documents for other cards mention that you apply through the online dashboard. Since the Diamond Elite is invitation-only, the user likely needs to respond to their invitation through their online banking portal or the link provided in the invitation.

I don't have any tool available to process credit card applications directly. I should inform the user that I can't process the application myself, and suggest they use their online banking dashboard or respond to their invitation to apply. If they want, I could transfer them to a human agent, but first let me see if there's some discoverable user tool.

tool_calls.Name: KB_search
tool_calls.Arguments: {"query": "discoverable tool Diamond Elite Card apply application invitation"}
